articles.title: GTA 6 Lands on Xbox Store. Wishlist Live.
articles.deck: Xbox posted the key art on May 22. The store page lists November 19. No pre-orders yet, just a wishlist button and a date already on the calendar.
articles.imageAlt: GTA 6 on the Xbox Store with a wishlist button

articles.title: Best Buy Lists GTA 6 Pre-Order Before Rockstar Says a Word
articles.deck: Best Buy put GTA 6 up for pre-order with a November 19 date before any official announcement. The listing is down. The date stuck.
articles.imageAlt: GTA 6 pre-order listing on Best Buy
